# UNIQ(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  uniq — report or omit repeated lines

## SYNOPSIS
  uniq [-c] [file]

## DESCRIPTION
Filters adjacent duplicate lines. Typically used after sort.

## OPTIONS
  -c  prefix lines by count of occurrences

## EXAMPLES
  sort /etc/passwd | uniq
  cat access.log | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
  cat users.txt | uniq

## SEE ALSO
  sort, grep, wc
